items.title: Platner Senate campaign taking 'time to reflect' on path forward after sexual assault allegation
items.description: Platner and his campaign denied the accusations made by 41-year-old Maine resident Jenny Racicot in a POLITICO article published Monday.

items.title: Trump Accounts are live. Here's how some families plan to use them
items.description: As Trump Accounts launch, millions of parents are figuring out how the new investment accounts fit with their family's financial goals.

items.title: China's Alibaba bans Anthropic AI for employees after 'distillation attack' accusation
items.description: Chinese e-commerce giant Alibaba has put Anthropic's Claude Code on a high-risk software list.

items.title: SpaceX President Gwynne Shotwell to donate stock to Trump Accounts
items.description: President Donald Trump told CNBC's Joe Kernen last week that he thought SpaceX CEO Elon Musk would donate company stock to the program.

items.title: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas
items.description: Toyota said it is investing $3.6 billion to move production of the Tacoma midsize pickup truck from Mexico to its San Antonio manufacturing campus in Texas.

items.title: Belgium loses appeal of Balogun eligibility after Trump defends intervention with FIFA
items.description: FIFA reversed Folarin Balogun’s suspension after Trump sought a review, letting the U.S. striker play Belgium as officials objected.

items.title: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, as Xbox unit downsizes and plans to spin off four gaming studios
items.description: Microsoft is cutting jobs in its commercial business and its Xbox gaming group, where revenue has been shrinking.

items.title: Here's our plan for both Honeywell stocks after a divergent first week of trading
items.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

items.title: Here's how SpaceX's Nasdaq-100 inclusion might affect options pricing
items.description: About half-a-million SpaceX options traded by midday Monday, a little below the average since inception.

items.title: NATO tensions are ‘growing pains,’ U.S. ambassador says as Trump presses allies
items.description: U.S. Ambassador to NATO Matthew Whitaker said NATO's allies boosting defense spending under pressure from Trump reflects “growing pains,” not a crisis.

items.title: Nvidia's next-gen AI rack system delayed to 2028 on manufacturing snags, SemiAnalysis says
items.description: The reported delay adds to concerns that Nvidia's breakneck annual release cadence is colliding with manufacturing limits.

items.title: Student loan servicers begin 90-day countdown for borrowers to leave SAVE plan
items.description: Student loan servicers have begun alerting borrowers that they have 90 days to leave the Biden-era SAVE plan. Here's what comes next.

items.title: Trump defends call urging Balogun red card review: 'It wasn't a foul'
items.description: "I didn't know what the hell a red card was," said Trump, who called FIFA President Gianni Infantino about the suspension of Folarin Balogun.

items.title: Rivian, Tesla and the 'Holly Index': How to trade the new EV Main Street battle
items.description: Mike Khouw gives a trade on Rivian and Tesla, informed by his wife's recent auto purchase.

items.title: Klarna seeks U.S. bank charter in latest push beyond buy now, pay later
items.description: Klarna joins a wave of fintech and crypto firms seeking entry to the traditional banking system.

items.title: TeraWulf shares soar after Anthropic leases data center in Kentucky
items.description: TeraWulf is a crytpo mining company that has pivoted to AI data center infrastructure. Its stock is up more than 80% this year.

items.title: Record heat, crowds drive offseason boom in international travel
items.description: Airlines are extending flight schedules to maximize on lucrative international travel.

items.title: 'Electronic warfare is a tech phenomenon': Why the market is rethinking defense valuations
items.description: There's a growing investment in newer areas of defense such as deep strike capabilities, anti-drone and unmanned systems, with different priorities for different countries.

items.title: Lockheed Martin to buy naval defense firm Ultra Maritime for $3.45 billion
items.description: Ultra is owned by private equity firm Advent International, and specialises in anti-submarine technology.

items.title: Versant agrees to buy golf simulator company Full Swing for $530 million
items.description: The deal for Full Swing will expand Versant's nontraditional media assets in an effort to diversify revenue from cable television.
